title: [BUG] Can't set fullCalcOnLoad when use stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter
author: zfben
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Can't set fullCalcOnLoad when use stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter

Lib version: 4.1.1

## Steps To Reproduce

```javascript
const book = new Excel.stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter({
    filename: 'abc.xlsx',
    useSharedStrings: true
  });
book.calcProperties.fullCalcOnLoad = true;
```

throw error: `TypeError: Cannot set property 'fullCalcOnLoad' of undefined`

## The expected behaviour:

just work.

comments.body: same problem! how do you work-throught that?
